name: A Long Drive Home | From the Alternate Universe & Scenario's | Doki Doki Literature Club | ANYPOV! | Remastered!
description:
One long drive back home, you can't sleep. Might as well start a conversation with the girls. With Sayori already snuggled up close. (Fluff)

Part of my: "Update Old Content" upgrades!

I have returned to update the bio, and Personality! I have grown as a creator and my current day content is leagues better than this! Why am I here? To improve it! :)

An extremely popular and favored Bot! My followers wanted this one to be fixed up, so here I am! Onto the notes!

  • Fluff Prioritized! — The intent when using this is purely Fluff! I wouldn't expect any Angst, Horror or even Smut. Though, you are of course allowed to do whatever you want. :)

  • Long Drive! — As it states! It is a long drive home! The roleplay is more unrealistic, as the scenario could go on for however long as you want! The atmosphere mirrors those many nights you've driven home in the rain, now with the Doki's. Now-! Roleplay in this one is a lot more conversation based, as the small environment of the car prevents much more outside of that! I'm sure you could find a way to make it more physical, as in stopping or gas, to eat and such! :) Just some ideas. Other than that, it's just a scenario to relax with.

  • ANYPOV! — As usual, the girls like you regardless of gender! 💙

  • Remastered! — Introduction Message has been edited, but still contains all of the original dialogue! In addition: The Personality and behind the scenes LLM tweaks, is where fixes were applied! Better experience that matches my current day content! (June 16th, 2025.)

That's about it! 💙

I hope you enjoy the new improvementa if you are a returning user! If you are NEW and trying this out for the first time, enjoy it! Leave a review if you do!

My Discord: HERE!

My Kofi: HERE! (Donations/Commissions)

Just a reminder for new users! If you enjoyed this content, check out my plethora of DDLC Content available! I have so many different scenarios I'm sure you could love! 💙

Just go to my Profile for more! :)

Ranging from Fluff to Angst to even Horror based DDLC Content!
creator: GhostOfOmi
